/*
Globals, in the traditional sense, are usually bad. But there are some
situations where we want either consts or known values that are constant per
invocation but invocation may be in various places, such as a test or via CLI,
and placing such a value in any given package leads to import issues. So think
of this package as "freeing us from circular dependency hell".

This package provides _exported_ globals that might reasonably be used by API
users, Terraform, etc. A separate package, under internal/intglobals, provides
globals that perform a similar function but are only meant for internal use.

There is no race checking; these values should only ever be set at startup of
Boundary or a test, but available to reference from anywhere.
*/

package globals

---
## Goal
- Move AnyAuthenticatedUserId, AnonymousUserId, and RecoveryUserId const declarations from github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/perms to github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals

## Constraints & Preferences
- Move across whole repository; change must typecheck after application

## Progress
### Done
- Added three constants (AnyAuthenticatedUserId="u_auth", AnonymousUserId="u_anon", RecoveryUserId="u_recovery") to globals.go in boundary/globals package
- Removed const declarations from internal/perms/acl.go
- Updated 10+ files across repository:
  - internal/iam/repository_scope.go (added globals import, updated 3 refs)
  - internal/daemon/controller/auth/testing.go (added globals import, updated 1 ref)
  - internal/daemon/controller/handlers/roles/role_service.go (updated 2 refs to globals.RecoveryUserId)
  - internal/daemon/controller/handlers/groups/group_service.go (updated 2 refs to globals.RecoveryUserId)
  - internal/daemon/controller/auth/auth.go (updated 1 ref to globals.RecoveryUserId)
  - internal/perms/acl_test.go (added globals import, updated 2 refs)

### In Progress
- Fix remaining undefined references in internal/perms package:
  - internal/perms/acl.go lines 141, 250 (AnonymousUserId, RecoveryUserId)
  - internal/perms/grants.go line 425 (AnonymousUserId)
  - internal/perms/output_fields.go line 69 (AnonymousUserId)

### Blocked
- build fails with errors:
  ```
  # github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/perms
  internal/perms/acl.go:141:15: undefined: AnonymousUserId
  internal/perms/acl.go:250:16: undefined: RecoveryUserId
  internal/perms/grants.go:425:34: undefined: AnonymousUserId
  internal/perms/output_fields.go:69:17: undefined: AnonymousUserId
  ```

## Key Decisions
- Used `globals` package import for all external references to user ID constants
- For files in same `perms` package as removed declarations, need explicit `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals` import (added to acl_test.go)
- AnonymousUserId was not yet moved fully—only the internal/perms declaration was removed

## Next Steps
1. Add import `"github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals"` to internal/perms/acl.go, grants.go, output_fields.go
2. Update references in those files:
   - acl.go line 141: AnonymousUserId → globals.AnonymousUserId
   - acl.go line 250: RecoveryUserId → globals.RecoveryUserId
   - grants.go line 425: AnonymousUserId → globals.AnonymousUserId
   - output_fields.go line 69: AnonymousUserId → globals.AnonymousUserId

## Critical Context
- Build error indicates internal/perms package still needs to import globals and update its own uses of the removed constants
- Constants are needed within perms package for ACL processing logic in same package
